name: editor4c: Tab indents the current list item (adds marginInlineStart)
_note: Phase B — Tab indents the current list item. Formerly an _open_ blocker: Radiant consumed Tab for focus rotation / translated it into a formatIndent beforeinput the editor (which handles Tab via keydown) never asked for, so it never reached FullEditorDom.handleKeyDown. Fixed in radiant/event.cpp: Tab is now dispatched as a keydown first (browser-faithful — Tab fires no beforeinput), with focus-nav only as the not-prevented fallback.
